title: CAWay
content:
# CAWay

The direction of the custom action. If `input-ca`, the app recieves and executes custom actions. If `output-ca`, the app sends custom actions which are then executed by an app with the corresponding `input-ca`.

## Enum Values

- `input-ca`
- `output-ca`
summary: The direction of the custom action. If `input-ca`, the app recieves and executes custom actions. If `output-ca`, the app sends custom actions which are then executed by an app with the corresponding `input-ca`.
